reason: The only residual finding is a minor fabrication: a '必須' column header was added without a source basis. However, all '必須' cells are empty, which is factually correct (all properties are '任意指定'). No incorrect information is conveyed to the AI agent. The restructured table (separating default values into their own column) is actually more readable than the original combined '備考' column. An AI agent using this knowledge file will correctly understand that none of the properties are required and will see the correct default values. The structural deviation from the source is cosmetic and does not affect agent behavior in mission-critical scenarios.

findings_assessment.justification: The '必須' column header lacks a source basis, but all cells are empty — consistent with '任意指定' for every property. No false mandatory/optional classification is introduced. The Phase E fix was not applied (Phase E output is identical to Phase D output), likely because the fixer determined that empty cells convey no incorrect information and the restructuring improves clarity. An agent reading this table will not be misled about any property's requiredness or default value.
